title: Cosmic Space Opera Dark Emperor
description: A dramatic, high-angle bird's-eye view of a dark emperor on a floating throne at the edge of a black hole, surrounded by planetary destruction.
content: Cinematic space opera realism, masterpiece quality. Camera Position: high overhead bird's-eye angle, slightly tilted | Framing: looking down at the emperor and throne from above, the black hole opening directly beneath/behind the throne into infinite darkness, planetary destruction radiating outward in a circular composition. The throne floats at the exact tipping point of the event horizon — a tiny figure in absolute command of cosmic destruction. Clothing: black robes spread dramatically outward from the throne seat, dissolving into dark smoke that curls into the gravitational pull below. The robe dissolution creates a visual wing-like silhouette when seen from above, giving the emperor a dark angelic geometry. Crown: the crown's golden light projects upward toward the camera, blazing directly at the viewer — a concentrated point of warm radiance against the darkness. The black hole's accretion disk forms an enormous ring of fire that fills the extreme background, gravitational lensing creating concentric arcs of bent starlight around the void. The depth of the black hole stretches downward into absolute darkness below the throne. Primary Light: accretion disk light radiating inward from all sides — warm amber-gold casting circular light patterns on the throne and robe spread. Secondary Light: crown's golden upward blaze creating a spotlight-like cone toward the viewer. Ambient: cold blue-white starlight and gravitational lens arcs creating fine rim highlights on planet fragments. Color Grade: radial color — warm gold and amber at the edges from the accretion disk, deep cold black at the void center | crown warm gold beacon | robe smoke dark violet-black. Textures: detailed planetary surface geography on planet fragments, hyper-detailed robe fabric spread, rough throne stone surface with glinting mineral inclusions. Vibes: 2001 A Space Odyssey meets Avengers Endgame portal scene meets Lovecraftian cosmic scale — overwhelming, circular, mythological.

Ultra-photorealistic 2x2 luxury glossy editorial collage featuring the same woman across all four panels, with strict identity consistency, strict body consistency, the same skin tone, the same proportions, and the same elegant posture language in every frame.

CONCEPT:
A dark luxury fashion editorial centered on sculptural back lines, shoulders, neck, arms, and an open-back black dress, with a mysterious fallen-angel aura. The mood is sensual, elegant, expensive, cinematic, controlled, and minimal. The overall feeling should be high-fashion editorial, refined and dramatic, never cheap or costume-like.

SUBJECT:
A beautiful woman with long loose black hair, consistent identity across all four panels. Hair is sleek yet softly textured, flowing naturally down the back and shoulders. Makeup is dark smoky eye makeup with softly diffused black shadow, defined brows, and a polished editorial finish. Nails are glossy black, long and elegant. Expression and body language are poised, feminine, and powerful.

OUTFIT:
Deep black velvet or satin halter dress with an open back, realistic glossy fabric highlights, natural draping, subtle tension around the waist and hips, and elegant luxury construction. The dress must look premium and believable, with no fabric glitches.

WINGS:
Large {argument name="wing type" default="black angel wings"} behind the woman, dramatic and elegant, slightly torn and weathered for a fallen-angel feeling. The wings should feel sculptural and luxurious, not fantasy cosplay. Feather texture should be rich, layered, dark, and realistic, with softly damaged edges. The wings must integrate beautifully with the poses and lighting without overpowering the fashion editorial tone.

SKIN:
Glossy editorial wet-skin finish with a subtle oil sheen on the shoulders, upper back, neck, arms, and along the spine line. Real skin texture must remain visible, including pores, natural tonal variation, and realistic highlights. No plastic smoothing. The sheen should look expensive, controlled, and believable, not sweaty or messy.

ENVIRONMENT:
Minimal studio background with a {argument name="backdrop color" default="warm grey or beige"} seamless backdrop. No props, no distractions, no clutter.

LIGHTING:
Premium glossy studio lighting:
- large softbox key light from the upper side
- narrow rim light tracing the shoulders, spine, and wing edges
- soft warm highlights on skin and fabric
- deep but clean shadows
- smooth gradient falloff
- high-end editorial contrast
- no harsh flash
- no fake glow

GRID 2x2:

TOP LEFT:
Back-facing pose, arms raised above the head, hands resting in the hair. Spine line, shoulder blades, and upper wing structure are emphasized with glossy highlights. Black hair falls naturally over part of the back while the open-back black dress and wings remain clearly visible.

TOP RIGHT:
Slight torso twist, one shoulder closer to the camera, head turned subtly away. The black dress catches light along one side, and the black angel wings frame the silhouette elegantly. Stro

title: Retro Nightlife Flash Portrait
description: A gritty 90s editorial style prompt for a male model in resort wear leaning against a vintage coupe car at night.
content: A young, athletic adult male styled in retro-modern evening resort wear stands with his hips pressed backward against a vehicle, his torso leaning asymmetrically toward the right while his shoulders slouch slightly back. His warm tan skin contrasts with a {argument name="shirt style" default="bright white, unbuttoned dress shirt"} that opens in a deep V-shape, paired with {argument name="pants style" default="cream off-white trousers"}. His slicked-back hair is sharply illuminated, and his head turns sharply 45 degrees to the left, his gaze directed off-camera and his eyes completely obscured by thick square black wayfarer-style sunglasses. His expression is aloof, confident, and serious, featuring a neutral, unsmiling mouth. His left hand rests naturally on his left thigh in the lower center frame, fingers loosely curled inward over his knee, revealing a silver wristwatch with a gold-tone dial. He leans heavily against the solid midground structure of a {argument name="car style" default="vintage mint green and white coupe car"}. The vehicle exhibits an aged, slightly oxidized matte-satin finish across its mint green body, detailing a vertical door seam, horizontal trim lines, and a silver chrome door handle, while its off-white roof reveals visible patchy dust spots and environmental wear. Below him, the solid, rough texture of the light gray paved asphalt floor catches the immediate illumination. Behind the vehicle, the background transitions into dense, broad-leafed trees and foliage that remain completely unlit, fading seamlessly into the deep black void of a retro coastal night sky. A single-source, highly directional on-camera flash pierces the darkness with harsh, daylight-balanced hard light, creating a highly energetic nightlife atmosphere. This intense frontal burst creates slightly blown-out specular highlights across his forehead, nose tip, exposed chest, the crisp white shirt collar, and the car's chrome details, before falling off rapidly into the deep background. Pitch black shadows with incredibly sharp, defined edges are cast abruptly under his shirt collar, beneath his arms, and directly behind his torso onto the mint green car door. The split-complementary color palette emphasizes the crisp whites and mint greens against the deep olive-black night. Captured on a 35mm lens at f/8, 1/160s, and ISO 400, the digital portrait channels a gritty 90s direct-flash editorial aesthetic. The image remains tack sharp across the subject and car side, while the deep background foliage subtly softens. Post-processing applies a high-contrast curve with crushed blacks, punchy highlights, a slightly cooled color temperature, and a touch of intentional film grain and digital noise lingering in the heavy shadows, all elegantly composed and framed in a 3:4 aspect ratio.

title: Scribbly MS Paint Redraw
description: A prompt that intentionally recreates a high-fidelity face in a clumsy, scribbly MS Paint style with mouse-drawn errors.
content:
Take the exact face from the attached reference image as the primary subject. Use the precise facial features, bone structure, eye shape, nose, lips, jawline, skin tone, and expression of the woman shown in the reference photo. Maintain her exact face with high fidelity as the core element, but redraw the entire image in the most {argument name="style" default="clumsy, scribbly, and utterly pathetic way"} possible. Create a terrible amateur {argument name="software" default="MS Paint drawing"} on a {argument name="background" default="pure white background"} using only a mouse, with jagged, uneven lines, horrible proportions, and obvious mistakes everywhere.

Make the hair look like it was drawn with the pencil tool in 5-pixel strokes, messy and scribbly with random stray lines sticking out. The eyes should be slightly misaligned, one bigger than the other, with crooked eyelashes and uneven pupils. The nose should be awkwardly shaped, the mouth lopsided and poorly filled. Skin should have visible pixelation, blotchy coloring, and bad airbrush attempts. Add terrible shading that looks like it was done with the spray can tool in MS Paint, with harsh edges and color bleeding.

Dress her in a poorly drawn version of the reference outfit using blocky shapes, wrong perspective, and mismatched colors. The hands and fingers must look broken and deformed, with extra or missing fingers. Pose her in a similar position to the reference but make the anatomy completely wrong — shoulders at odd angles, neck too long or too short, head floating unnaturally.

Emphasize the low-quality pixel-by-pixel feel with visible compression artifacts, dithering, and 1990s Windows 95 aesthetic. The overall drawing should be vaguely similar to the reference but also not really — kind of matching but off in a confusing, awkward, and hilarious way. Proportions should be ridiculous, symmetry completely broken, colors oversaturated or completely wrong in places. Include random MS Paint artifacts like leftover selection marquees, thick black outlines that don’t match, and clumsy fill bucket overflows.

The background must be completely white with no extra elements except maybe a few accidental scribbles or stray pixels. Make it look like a child or a very unskilled adult spent 10 minutes struggling in MS Paint. Prioritize maximum pathetic quality — the worse it looks, the better. Exaggerate every flaw while still keeping the core identity of the exact face from the reference image recognizable but hilariously distorted.

Photorealistic accuracy is forbidden. Only crude, low-resolution, mouse-drawn MS Paint style is allowed. Maximum chaos, maximum awkwardness, maximum comedy in the terrible execution.

title: Mini-Me Character Composite Image
description: A complex prompt for creating a composite image with 3D chibi characters interacting with a real person isolated from a photo.
content:
Based on this image, centering on the person in the photo, please generate an "emotional composite image where mini-me characters come alive and move around." [Core Concept] "My little alter-egos in my daily life" Cute, playful, yet aesthetic direction Instagram aesthetic + an image with a story [1. Person Processing - Crucial] The original person must be cut out/isolated from the background (Absolutely no changes to the face or pose allowed).
Place the person in the center or slightly towards the front of the scene. Add natural shadows. Add a thin white border around the person's outline (like a sticker, but not too thick). [2. Mini-Me Character Generation - Core] Generate multiple "mini-me characters" based on the person. Style: {argument name="style" default="3D cute SD (Super Deformed/Chibi) characters (Roblox or pixel styles are acceptable)"}. Must reflect the exact facial features, hairstyle, and clothing of the person. [Mini-Me Characteristics]
Small size (palm-sized feel). Multiple characters appearing ({argument name="count" default="around 3 to 7 characters"}). [3. Mini-Me Actions - Crucial] Each character must be actively doing something. Examples: {argument name="actions" default="Jumping and playing Waving hands Mimicking the person Sitting on an object Climbing on the person's shoulder or head Looking like they are talking to each other"} 👉 "Static/frozen characters are strictly prohibited" [4. Placement & Direction]
Place them naturally on top of books / bags / shoulders / the floor / hands, etc. Place some in front of the person and some behind → to create a sense of depth and space. Add shadows as if they actually exist in the physical space. [5. Title Generation - Core Feature] Analyze the mood of the image and automatically generate a short, aesthetic text title. [Title Rules] 2 to 5 words long. Do not explain; just convey the "vibe." Avoid overly trendy internet slang. Natural and aesthetic tone.
[Example Vibes/Titles] Today's moment Just a good day Little joys of the day My own timing Small happiness Recording this moment Just found it funny 👉 Must "generate a new title that fits the mood of the image" [6. Title Placement] Place some text behind the person. Place some text in front. 👉 Create a three-dimensional layered composition. Do not make the text too large (maintain the aesthetic vibe). Use a soft font style. [7. Doodles & Sticker Elements]
Add handwritten-style doodles (thin pen feel). Examples: Arrows → Circles for emphasis Stars ✨ Hearts ♡ Dotted lines 👉 Only add 3 to 6 elements (do not overdo it) [8. Auxiliary Text (Optional)] Small sticker-like text. Examples: mini me today mood lol daily [9. Overall Style] Bright and warm tones. Maintain natural colors. Avoid looking too much like CG (computer graphics). Aim for a "real photo + cute composite" feel. [10. Prohibitions] No changing the person's face.
No characters looking out of place or disconnected from the scene. No game UI styles. No excessive filters or effects. No card-news (infographic) style text blocks.

title: PS1 Retro Gaming Style Prompt
description: A comprehensive prompt designed to transform an image into a low-poly PlayStation 1 era video game screenshot, featuring authentic technical artifacts.
content:
Transform the entire image into an authentic screenshot captured directly from a {argument name="console era" default="late-1990s PlayStation 1 (PS1)"} video game running on original hardware. Re-render every single element of the scene — every object, character, surface, background, lighting, and detail — as {argument name="geometry style" default="low-polygon 3D models"} with clearly visible triangular facets, flat angular geometry, and no smoothing or subdivision whatsoever. Use extremely low-resolution textures (256×256 pixels or smaller) that are blurry, pixelated, and heavily compressed, with obvious tiling seams, mipmapping artifacts, and poor UV mapping.
Apply classic PS1 affine texture mapping across all surfaces so textures visibly stretch, warp, wobble, and distort unnaturally with any change in perspective or camera angle (especially noticeable on floors, walls, and curved objects). Remove all anti-aliasing entirely — every edge must be sharply jagged and aliased with prominent stair-stepping. Use only basic flat shading or simple Gouraud vertex shading with no dynamic lights, no real-time shadows, no specular highlights, and no advanced effects. Simulate the PS1’s 16-bit color depth and 5-5-5 RGB limitations by introducing visible checkerboard or ordered dithering patterns in all color gradients, skies, shadows, and semi-transparent areas to prevent banding.
Include typical PS1 graphical quirks: subtle vertex snapping/jitter/wobbling on moving or angled geometry, minor polygon pop-in or Z-fighting where appropriate, and a limited draw distance that may softly fade into a low-detail fog. The overall resolution should feel like a raw {argument name="resolution" default="320×240"} or 640×480 PS1 framebuffer output, giving the whole image a slightly soft yet crunchy retro pixel look when viewed at modern sizes. Preserve the original scene composition and camera angle exactly, but convert everything into this pure PS1 3D style as if the photo itself were modeled and rendered inside an actual PS1 game. No text overlays, no HUD elements, no subtitles, no menu graphics, no scanlines, no CRT curvature, and no modern post-processing of any kind — just a clean, direct screenshot from the console’s video output.

Elemental Interaction Where the rivers meet, the collision creates violent physical contrast: steam, glowing cracks, frost bloom, blackened wet concrete, cooling rock, and frozen shards. The meeting point must feel emotionally symbolic, like two inner states colliding. Creature Creation Story (CRITICAL) The lava and ice pouring from the palms are actively creating creatures on the floor. Some are fully shaped and wandering around the seated character. Lava creatures: glowing, semi-molten, ember-veined, heat-distorted silhouettes. Ice creatures: translucent, frosted, crystalline, sharp-edged, cold-vapor silhouettes. They should vary in size and animals language, all kind of animals and insects. A few lava and ice creatures are already surrounding the character in quiet loyalty or silent observation. Character Pose & Emotion The character is seated, still, introspective, emotionally exhausted. Head slightly lowered. Shoulders carrying invisible weight. Palms open and angled downward so the lava and ice pour naturally from them. The pose must feel like grief, restraint, and power at the same time. Not a triumphant spellcasting pose. Camera & Perspective Use a low cinematic perspective, slightly below the seated character's eye line. Lens: 24mm or 28mm. title: Side-by-Side Portrait of Realistic Woman in Saree and Cartoon Younger Self
description: A complex prompt for Nano Banana Pro requiring the generation of a side-by-side composition: one side featuring a photorealistic woman in a traditional white saree with detailed ikat patterns, and the other side featuring an identical-faced, cartoonish younger version of the same woman, both based on a single uploaded reference image.
content:
Take the image provided above as the primary and only reference for the woman's face. Ensure an exact 100% facial match with zero alterations to the facial features, bone structure, eye shape, eye color, nose shape, lip shape, eyebrow arch, jawline, skin texture, or any other facial detail. The face of the woman on the right must be an identical, photorealistic replica of the face in the reference image, including the exact same makeup application, lip color, eye expression, and lighting nuances visible on her face.
Create a high-quality, side-by-side composition featuring two figures standing against a simple, dark plain wall with subtle texture and even, soft studio lighting. The background should be minimalist, clean, and dark charcoal or deep gray in tone to make both figures pop without any distractions.
Position the realistic woman on the right side of the frame. She must wear a traditional white saree made of soft, flowing fabric with a wide, bold black border. The black border should feature intricate traditional geometric ikat patterns in rich shades of red and warm brown, including repeating diamond, triangle, and abstract tribal motifs. The saree should be draped elegantly in a classic Nivi style, with the pallu falling gracefully over her left shoulder. Pair the saree with a solid black V-neck blouse that fits perfectly, showing a modest yet elegant neckline. Add a beautiful turquoise and pearl choker necklace around her neck, with small gold accents that complement the ikat patterns. Style her hair exactly as seen in the reference image — wet-look, voluminous, with reddish-brown highlights, strands falling naturally around her face and shoulders. Pose her leaning casually yet gracefully against the dark wall, with one shoulder lightly touching the surface. Her body should be turned slightly toward the camera, her head tilted gently, and she should look directly at the camera with a soft, confident slight smile. Maintain her exact original facial expression, skin glow, and makeup from the reference photo without any changes.
On the left side of the frame, place an animated cartoonish younger version of the same woman. This character must be visibly shorter in height, approximately 60-70% the height of the realistic woman, giving a cute, youthful, and adorable proportion. Render her in a vibrant, high-detail 2D cartoon/anime-influenced style with smooth lines, soft shading, and charming exaggerated features typical of modern character animation, while strictly maintaining 100% exact likeness to the reference face. The animated girl’s face must be an identical match to the woman’s face in the original image — same eyes, same nose, same lips, same eyebrow shape, same facial structure, and same expression base, only adapted into a cute cartoon format without altering the core likeness. Give her similar voluminous, curly, wavy hair with the same reddish-brown tones

title: Day and Night Split Portrait Prompt for Nano Banana Pro
description: A highly detailed prompt for generating a hyper-realistic 8K portrait using Nano Banana Pro, featuring a vertical split down the center of the face. The left side represents day (warm golden light, blue sky, sunflower) and the right side represents night (cool blue moonlight, dark sky, stars, fireflies). The prompt specifies camera settings (85mm f/1.8, close-up) and distinct lighting temperatures (3200K vs 7000K) for a sharp juxtaposition.
content:
Day and night split portrait:

A hyper-realistic 8K photo of a young woman's portrait, with her face split vertically and sharply down the center of her nose, representing two different times of day. The LEFT HALF of her face is illuminated by warm, golden afternoon daylight, with sun-kissed skin and eye reflections of the sun and clouds. Her hair shows warm highlights, and she wears a white linen shirt on the left shoulder. The background behind the left side features a bright blue sky, a sunflower, green leaves, and a butterfly near her left ear. The RIGHT HALF of her face is bathed in cool, blue moonlight, with a cool-toned, slightly silvery complexion, and eye reflections of moonlight and stars. Her hair shows cool blue highlights, and she wears a dark velvet dress visible on the right shoulder. The background on the right shows a dark night sky with visible stars, a crescent moon, fireflies glowing, and a moth near her right ear. The transition between the two halves is abrupt and sharp, with a perfect vertical dividing line running through the center of the nose bridge, creating a stunning and impossible juxtaposition of day and night. The woman maintains a calm, direct gaze with the same expression on both halves. The lighting setup is distinctly different on each side, with warm 3200K daylight from the left and cool 7000K moonlight from the right, with no bleed. The image is captured on an 85mm f/1.8 lens as a head-and-shoulders close-up at direct eye-level angle, with a shallow depth of field, rendering a photorealistic, clean, and beautiful image with share-worthy qualities.

title: The Food Galaxy: Cosmic Indian Street Food Solar System
description: A creative and detailed prompt for Nano Banana 2 to generate a surreal, photorealistic image of Indian street food floating in deep space, where each food item represents a celestial body (e.g., tandoori roti as the sun, golgappa as a planet, samosas as asteroids). The prompt specifies lighting, background elements (spice nebula, lassi Milky Way), and style.
content:
Create a cosmic/space scene where various Indian street foods are floating in deep space as if they are planets, moons, and celestial objects in a delicious galaxy.

THE FOOD SOLAR SYSTEM:
- CENTER (Sun): A massive round tandoori roti, glowing from within like a star, with charred spots resembling sunspots, radiating warm golden light outward
- PLANET 1 (closest): A perfect round golgappa/pani puri — crispy shell glistening, filled with spiced water visible through the opening. Tiny orbit ring of sev and chutney droplets.
- PLANET 2: A round vada (medu vada) as a donut-shaped planet with a ring system made of coconut chutney
- PLANET 3: A plate of round gulab jamuns as a cluster of sweet brown planets with syrup nebula around them
- ASTEROID BELT: Dozens of floating samosas, pakoras, and bhel pieces scattered in a ring
- PLANET 4 (gas giant): A huge round dahi vada — white yogurt surface like a cloudy gas giant, with tempering (tadka) marks resembling Jupiter's storms
- COMET: A kebab skewer streaking across the scene with a trail of spice smoke and sparks
- MOON: A round idli orbiting the dahi vada planet
- NEBULA: A colorful cloud of turmeric (yellow), chili (red), and coriander (green) powders mixing in space, forming a stunning spice nebula

BACKGROUND:
- Deep space black with thousands of tiny stars (mustard seeds and cumin seeds floating as stars)
- Distant galaxies made of swirling masala powder
- The Milky Way visible but made of a stream of white lassi/buttermilk

LIGHTING:
- The tandoori roti "sun" provides warm orange light illuminating nearby foods
- Each food item has its own subtle glow — the hot items emit warm light, the cold items (lassi, curd) emit cool blue light
- Dramatic space lighting: stark bright highlights, deep black shadows, no atmosphere

STYLE: Photorealistic food photography meets NASA space photography. Every food item is rendered with appetite-triggering detail — crispy textures, steam, glistening oil, fresh garnishes — but floating in actual outer space with real stars and cosmic phenomena. This surreal combination is the kind of image people share saying "this is the most Indian thing I've ever seen." 8K resolution.

RIGHT HALF — WINTER:

title: Premium Studio Ad Visual for Starbucks Frappuccino
description: A detailed prompt for Nano Banana Pro, instructing it to act as a senior art director to create a photorealistic CGI studio ad visual for a Starbucks Frappuccino. The prompt specifies canvas size, background color, watermark pattern, logo placement, product positioning, lighting conditions, and technical specifications, aiming for a high-end luxury brand aesthetic.
content:
Act as a senior art director and studio photographer for high-end advertising campaigns and e-commerce.

Format & Canvas
Vertical 9 :16. Background: {argument name="background color" default="warm off-white (# F4EFE6)"} or a neutral tone characteristic of the brand, with no visible shadows.

Background Pattern
Apply the brand’s signature motif as a large, tone-on-tone watermark (10–18% opacity). Motif size should be 15–25% of the canvas width, with a soft, slightly embossed feel.

Logo Placement
Position the Starbucks logo centered in the upper third. Width: 40–50% of the canvas. Use a flat, two-dimensional rendering in official brand colors.
Place the wordmark below the logo in spaced uppercase letters, matching the logo color. Wordmark height: approximately 60% of the logo height.

Product Placement
Photorealistic Starbucks frappuccino with full material fidelity (cup, lid, straw, textures, branding details).
Position: bottom right, angled at 25–35°. Cropped at 60–75%, occupying 55–65% of the canvas.
Use soft contact shadows (8–12% opacity), with no harsh shadows.

Lighting
Soft, directional daylight (5500–6000K). Key light from top left, fill from the right.
Minimal contrast (1.2–1.5:1), with global illumination for subtle light bounce.
No edge highlights; reflections only on metallic elements. Avoid hard shadows.

Typography & Finishing
At the bottom: a thin horizontal line (1 px, 80% width, in brand color).
Below it: microcopy ({argument name="microcopy text" default="social link or collection tag"}) in a clean sans-serif font, aligned with the context.

Technical Specifications
Photorealistic CGI (KeyShot/Octane style), 9: 16, ultra-high detail, f/16 depth of field, sharp edges, neutral color accuracy, slightly warm background, no environmental reflections.
Mood reference: official visuals from Louis Vuitton / Bottega Veneta / Celine.

title: Cinematic 3D Toy Character Evolution Sequence
description: A highly structured prompt for generating a cinematic image showing the evolution of a 3D toy character across 6-8 stages in a single frame, emphasizing absolute likeness integrity, diagonal composition, progressive motion, and dramatic lighting to highlight the final, evolved form.
content:
A cinematic evolution sequence of the 3d toy character shown as multiple identical instances progressing from primitive to fully realized form across a single frame.
🔒 LIKENESS INTEGRITY (ABSOLUTE PRIORITY)

All instances must preserve exactly:

• proportions

• eye shape, spacing, stylization

• silhouette

• material identity
No redesign. No added features. No anatomy change. Only pose progression is allowed.
🧠 EVOLUTION STRUCTURE (MANDATORY)

The character appears repeated in a left-to-right progression of 6–8 stages:

• earliest stage: crouched, compressed, almost animalistic or inactive

• mid stages: gradual spine lift, awareness, balance emerging

• final stage: fully upright, confident forward motion
Each stage must feel like a natural transformation, not separate poses.

Motion must read as a continuous evolution.
🎥 CAMERA & PERSPECTIVE

Low-angle cinematic shot, slightly below mid-body height of the final character

Shot with a 28–35mm lens to create subtle perspective compression and depth

Camera positioned closer to the final evolved character, making it dominant in frame

The earliest forms recede into the background along a diagonal progression
⚖️ COMPOSITION (CRITICAL)

Diagonal layout from back-left (primitive) → front-right (evolved)

Foreground dominated by the final form, partially cropped for tension

Earlier stages progressively smaller and more compressed into depth

No centered symmetry
🎯 DEPTH OF FIELD (MANDATORY)

Primary focal plane locked on the most evolved character

Mid stages slightly softer

Earliest stages fall into progressive blur
No full-frame sharpness
💡 LIGHTING

Strong directional light from the side or rear

Rim light increases progressively across evolution stages

Primitive forms sit more in shadow

Final form is clearly defined with sculptural light separation
🌫 ATMOSPHERE

Subtle haze or volumetric light to enhance depth layering

Light falloff increases toward background

Optional faint dust or particles to create dimensional space
🎨 COLOR CONTROL

Primitive stages slightly desaturated and darker

Color richness increases toward the final evolved form

Controlled contrast, no oversaturation
🧱 SURFACE & MATERIAL

Maintain exact original material identity

Enhance micro-detail only on the focal character

No texture reinterpretation
🔥 EMOTION

Inevitable transformation

From instinct → awareness → dominance

The final character feels like the destination of a journey
🚫 NEGATIVE CONSTRAINTS

No random poses

No redesign

No symmetry

No flat lighting

No full-body sharpness everywhere

No equal importance across all stages
Aspect Ratio: ar 16:9

title: Futuristic Holographic Burj Khalifa Blueprint
description: A detailed prompt for generating a futuristic, cinematic image of the Burj Khalifa architectural blueprint projected as a glowing, actively constructing hologram above a high-tech glass table. The prompt specifies the transition from wireframe to photorealistic structure, lighting (neon blue/cyan), and environment (minimal architectural lab).
content:
CONCEPT:
A futuristic architectural blueprint of the Burj Khalifa projected as a glowing hologram, actively constructing itself in mid-air through robotic precision and digital intelligence.

SUBJECT:
A semi-transparent holographic version of the Burj Khalifa floating above a sleek glass smart table. The lower portion appears as a glowing blue wireframe blueprint, while the upper portion transitions into a fully photorealistic skyscraper with reflective glass panels and metallic structure as it builds itself in real-time.

ENVIRONMENT:
A high-tech architectural lab with a dark, minimal interior. The blueprint originates from a glossy black glass table embedded with touch controls, glowing UI panels, and soft neon edges. Subtle reflections of the hologram appear on the table surface. Background is clean, futuristic, and slightly blurred.

STRUCTURAL DETAILS:
The central spire rises as glowing gridlines before solidifying into steel and glass  
Tiered setbacks of the tower assemble through hovering robotic drones  
Glass facade panels lock into place with precise alignment and reflections  
Laser beams scan and map each level during construction  
Small AI drones orbit around the structure, actively building and welding components  
Materials transition from holographic light into real textures — polished glass, steel beams, and concrete core  
Floating UI overlays show measurements, grids, and rotating architectural schematics

VISUAL MECHANIC:
The blueprint exists in layered form — base is a glowing grid, mid-layer is a semi-transparent wireframe, and top layer is fully realistic. Certain sections flicker between hologram and solid material, emphasizing the transformation.

LIGHTING:
Dark environment with strong neon blue and cyan holographic glow. Subtle rim lighting created by reflections from the hologram. Volumetric light beams and soft particles enhance depth.

CAMERA & LENS:
Shot on a full-frame camera, 35mm lens. Slight low-angle perspective to emphasize scale and height. Sharp focus on the hologram core with slight background blur.

COMPOSITION:
Vertical 2:3 format. The Burj Khalifa hologram is centered, rising upward. UI elements orbit symmetrically around it. Clean negative space enhances the futuristic aesthetic.

STYLE & MOOD:
Futuristic, cinematic, high-tech, and minimal. Feels like advanced AI-driven architecture and innovation. Clean, premium, and visually striking.

DETAILS:
Ultra-sharp holographic lines, glowing particles, realistic glass reflections, smooth transitions between digital and physical materials, micro UI details, 8K resolution, HDR, cinematic color grading with blue/cyan tones and deep contrast.

NEGATIVE PROMPT:
cluttered environment, low detail, dull lighting, messy UI, cartoon style, distorted structure, blurry hologram, watermark

The field is filled with bright yellow mustard blooms stretching endlessly into the distance, gently swaying in a soft breeze. Snow capped mountains are faintly visible far in the background under a clear blue sky, adding depth and a natural Kashmiri landscape feel.

The young man stands relaxed among the tall mustard plants, slightly brushing the flowers with his hand while looking calmly toward the horizon. His expression is peaceful and natural. His hair moves softly in the breeze, adding a sense of motion.

He is wearing a simple light outfit, a white shirt with rolled sleeves and dark pants, creating a clean contrast against the vibrant yellow flowers. The sunlight falls warmly across his face and shoulders, creating natural highlights and soft shadows with realistic skin texture.

The scene feels fresh and bright with soft natural daylight illuminating the field. Small details like moving flowers, distant hills, and light wind add realism.

Captured like professional outdoor photography using a DSLR camera with an 85mm lens. Shallow depth of field keeps the young man in sharp focus while the mustard field softly blurs in the background. Full-body vertical portrait (9:16), subject centered. Eye-level perspective capturing the full outfit and stance. Clean architectural framing with balanced space.
Lighting:
Soft natural twilight mixed with subtle artificial city lighting. Even, diffused illumination with gentle shadows. Neutral-to-cool color tones with slight warm highlights.

Professional editorial / lifestyle photography, photorealistic. Shot as if on Canon EOS 5D Mark IV, 85mm lens, f/2.0. Sharp focus on subject, realistic depth of field, smooth transitions, natural skin texture, visible details, no over-processing. Ultra-detailed, 8K quality.
